narrative: This is too broad for one query. A useful decomposition: (1) how large is the readmitted-sepsis cohort, (2) what do their last-24h ICU labs look like vs non-readmitted sepsis, (3) which antibiotics differ between the two groups at discharge.

competency_questions.original_question: How many sepsis patients were readmitted within 30 days?
competency_questions.interpretation_summary: Count of admissions with a sepsis diagnosis flagged readmitted_30d = 1.

competency_questions.original_question: Compare last-24h ICU labs between readmitted and non-readmitted sepsis patients.
competency_questions.interpretation_summary: Mean creatinine / lactate / WBC in the last 24h of ICU, grouped by readmitted_30d, in sepsis admissions.

competency_questions.original_question: Which antibiotics were prescribed to readmitted vs non-readmitted sepsis patients?
competency_questions.interpretation_summary: Antibiotic exposure in sepsis admissions, grouped by readmitted_30d.
